rationale: PR fixes a real scoring bug where teams that made no transfers in a round had no TeamPlayerSnapshot and therefore scored 0 even when their players had ScoringEvent rows. packages/server/src/utils/scoring.ts exports a new `backfillRoundSnapshots(prisma, tenantId, roundId)` function that finds teams without snapshots, queries their current TeamPlayer rows, and bulk-inserts via createMany({ skipDuplicates: true }) — idempotent by design and returns {teamsBackfilled, snapshotsCreated}. packages/server/src/trpc/routers/gameweek.ts imports the new helper and invokes it inside the existing $transaction in finaliseRound, between the round.update status->complete and the calculateRoundPoints call. Tests are substantive: scoring.test.ts adds three real tests (creates snapshots from TeamPlayer rows, idempotency on re-run, downstream points calculation), and gameweek.test.ts adds an end-to-end regression that asserts snapshotsBefore is empty, finaliseRound runs, snapshotsAfter has length 1 with correct playerId, and the team's points field is updated to 15 (the try value). New createTestTeamPlayer helper added. ARCHITECTURE.md and backend-api.md document the lifecycle and invariant. Closed without merge appears editorial, not a content problem.
